verses.text: Mualtung panin Moses hong tun'suk hakna mite in a theih uh ciangin, Aaron kiangah mite amau mah kikaikhawm tawmin ama kiangah, “Kithawi in; kote' mai-ah a pai ding pasian hong bawlsak in. Egypt leitang panin eite hong paikhiatpih to Moses ahih leh bang suak khin cih i thei kei hi,” a ci uh hi
Aaron in amaute kiangah, “Na zite, na tapate, leh na tanute uh bil tungah a om kham bilbahte sutkhia un la, kei kiangah tuate hong paipih un,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin mi khempeuh in amau' bil-a om kham bilbahte sutkhia-in Aaron' kiangah tuate a paipih uh hi

Amah in amaute' tung panin kham saangin, sumtui sun'na sungah sungin, a kisung bawngno khat bawlsak a, tua ciangin mite in, “Israel mite aw, hih pen Egypt leitang panin note hong paikhiatpih to na pasian uh!” a ci uh hi
Aaron in hih thu a muh ciangin, amah in tua mai-ah biakna tau khat lam a, “Zing ciang pen Topa-a' ding pawi bawl ni hi ding hi,” ci-in zaksakna a bawl hi
Amaute zingsangin tho baih uh a, meihal biakna pia-in thunuama biakna zong a paipih uh hi. Pawi an ne-in mite tu uh a, zu khamin numei pasal kisawk ngeingai uh hi
Topa in Moses kiangah, “Paisuk in; bang hang hiam cih leh Egypt leitang panin nangmah in na paikhiatpih toh mite amau kisiasak uh hi

Ka thupiakna lampi panin amaute kiheikhia pak uh hi. Amau-a' dingin amaute in a kisung bawngno khat bawlin, tua bia-in a tungah biakna pia uh a, ‘Israel mite aw, hih pen Egypt leitang panin note hong paikhiatpih to na pasian uh ahi hi!’ ci uh hi,” a ci hi
Topa in Moses kiangah, “Hih mite ka mu zo hi. En in, a lungkhauh mite ahi uh hi
Tua ahih ciangin tu-in amaute tungah ka sinso-in amaute ka beisak theihna dingin kei guak hong omsak in. Ahi zongin nang ahih leh minam lian khatin kong bawl ding hi,” a ci hi
Ahih hangin Moses in Topa ama Pasian tungah thum a, “ Topa aw, na vangliatna leh na thahatna tawh Egypt leitang panin na paikhiatpih ahi nangma mite tungah bang hangin sinso ding na hi hiam

Bang hangin Egypt mite in, ‘Mualtungah amaute a that ding leh leitung panin amaute a beisak dingin siatna ngaihsutna tawh amah in amaute paikhiatpih hi,’ ci ding uh ahi hiam? A kihtakhuai na hehna daisak in la, na lungsim khelin na mite tungah hih siatna tungsak kei in

Amaute' tungah nangmahmah kiciamin, ‘Na suanlekhakte uh vantung aksi bangin tamsakin, keimah in ka ciamsa hih leitang khempeuh na suanlekhakte uh tungah ka pia ding a, amaute in luah tawntung ding uh hi,’ na cihna na nasemte Abraham, Isaac, leh Israel phawk in,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Topa in a lungsim khel a, ama mite' tungah a tun'sak ding siatna tungsak nawnlo hi
Tua ciangin Moses kihei-in, a khutsunga om thuciamna suangpeek nih, a pang langnih tuakah a kigelh suangpeekte tawh mualtung panin a paisuk hi
A peekte pen Pasian' bawl hi a, a kigelh thute pen suangpeek tungah Pasian' gelh ahi hi
Joshua in amaute' kiko gamlumna a zak ciangin Moses kiangah, “Giahphualah kido-a gamlumna om hi,” a ci hi
Ahih hangin Moses in, “Tu-a gamlumna pen zawhna kikona aw ahi a, lelhna kikona aw ahi zongin, tua bang pawl hilo hi. Ahih hangin tu-a ka zak pen lasakna awging ahi hi,” a ci hi
Giahphual nai-ah amah tungin bawngno leh lamna a muh phetin, Moses heh mahmah a, amah in ama khutsung panin suangpeekte lawn a, mual bulah tuate a sukham hi
Amah in amaute' bawlsa bawngno la-in mei tawh hal a, gawivui-in tui tungah theh a, Israel mite a tui dawnsak hi
Moses in Aaron kiangah, “Amaute' tungah khialhna lianpi khat na tun'pihna dingin hih mite in nang' tungah bang hong gen uh ahi hiam?” a ci hi
Aaron in, “Ka topa aw, heh lua kei in. Mite' lungsim na theihsa ahih mah bangin amaute in siatna ngaihsun uh hi

Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in keima kiangah, ‘Kote' mai-ah a pai ding pasian hong bawlsak in. Egypt leitang panin eite hong paikhiatpih to Moses ahih leh, bang suak khin cih i thei kei hi,’ ci uh hi
Keimah in amaute kiangah, ‘Kham a nei peuhpeuh in sutkhia un,’ ka ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin amaute in kei' tungah hong pia uh a, keimah in mei sungah tuate ka lawn a, hih bawngno hong suak hi,” a ci hi
Mite a tatkhialhna Moses in a muh ciangin (bang hang hiam cih leh Aaron in amau' maizumna dingin amau' galte' lakah amaute takhial sak hi
giahphual kongpi sungah Moses ding a, “ Topa' lamah kua teng om na hi uh hiam? Kei' kiangah hong pai un,” a ci hi. Levi mite khempeuh ama kiangah hong kikaikhawm uh hi

Amah in amaute kiangah, “Israel-te' Topa Pasian in hih bangin ci hi: ‘A milip in a namsau a pangah tawi-in kongpi khat pan kongpi khat, giahphual khempeuhah pai kawikawi-in, a milip in a sanggampa, a milip in a kikholhpihpa, a milip in a vengpa that hen,’ ci hi,” ci-in a gen hi
Moses' thugen bangin Levi mite gamta uh a, tua ni-in mihing tul thum bang si hi
Moses in, “Note' tungah thupha hong tun' theihna dingin ama tapa leh a sanggamte ciat supna thuakin Topa' na sepna dingah tuni-in note na kikipsak tawm uh hi,” a ci hi
A zingsang ciangin Moses in mite kiangah, “Note in khialhna lianpi khat na bawl khin uh hi. Tu-in Topa' kiangah kei ka pai ding a, note' khialhna thu-ah kilemna ka va bawl thei khading hi,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin Topa' kiangah Moses paikikin, “Ala, hih mite in khialhna lianpi khat bawl khin uh a, amaute in amau-a' dingin kham pasian khat bawl khin uh hi
Ahih hangin nangmah in tu-in amau' khialhna maisak in. Na maisak kei ding leh, hong thum ing, nangma gelhsa laibu panin keimah hong phiatmai in,” a ci hi
Ahih hangin Topa in Moses kiangah, “Kei' tungah hong khial peuhmah, ka laibu panin ka phiat ding hi

Ahih hangin tu-in pai in; nang' tunga kong gensa munah mite paipih in. En in, na mai-ah ka vantung mi pai ding hi. Ahi zongin ka thukkik ni ciangin amau' khialhna amau' tungah ka thuk ding hi,” a ci hi
Amaute in Aaron' bawlsa bawngno bia uh ahih manin Topa in mite' tungah gimna a tungsak hi.
